sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77505" key="panopli/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰνοπλ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n77505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">man in full armour</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. for</abbr> sq., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0266.tlg001:11:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tyrt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
